description_long: This object is a pump-action shotgun featuring a long, cylindrical black barrel with a wooden fore-end and stock. The barrel is smooth and extends significantly from the receiver, suggesting a standard hunting or sporting configuration. The receiver is black and compact, with a visible trigger and a rounded trigger guard. The wooden stock and fore-end have a polished finish, displaying a natural wood grain pattern. The shotgun's pump mechanism is clearly visible beneath the barrel, and the overall design is streamlined and functional. The object appears robust, with a combination of metal and wood materials typical of traditional shotguns.
description: A pump-action shotgun with a long black barrel, wooden stock, and fore-end, featuring a visible pump mechanism and a rounded trigger guard.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, highlighting the wooden stock, fore-end, and the long black barrel.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the circular muzzle of the barrel and the alignment of the pump and stock directly behind it.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the other side of the wooden stock and fore-end, as well as the full barrel.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the end of the wooden stock and the alignment of the barrel and pump mechanism.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, long and smooth with no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with a smooth contour and no visible finger grooves or reinforcement
